allow: WebFetch(domain:www.figma.com)
Bash(Test-Path "d:\\game\\image\\header.png")
Bash(dir "d:\\game")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Name "powershell" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"d:\\game\\serve.ps1`"" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\game"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Host "Server restarted")
PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File `"d:\\game\\serve.ps1`"" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\game"; Write-Host "Server started")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/SFX/BACKGROUND/SFX%201.mp3" -Method Head; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) ContentType: $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })
PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/" -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Host "Server running: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Server not running" })

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command `"cd 'd:\\game'; .\\serve.ps1`"" -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest 'http://localhost:8000/' -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Host "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Still not running" })
PowerShell(python --version 2>&1)
PowerShell(python3 --version 2>&1)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/SFX/BACKGROUND/SFX%201.mp3" -Method Head -TimeoutSec 3; Write-Host "Audio OK: $\($r.StatusCode\) - $\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:8000/" -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Server OK" } catch { Write-Host "Not running: $_" })
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File serve.ps1)
Bash(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8000/)
